name: Hem Noodle House
personalNotes: The broth here is incredible - they simmer it for 12+ hours. Skip the English menu and ask for the 'special'.

name: The Coffee Apartment
personalNotes: Touristy but actually has some decent cafes inside. The view from the balcony at sunset is worth it.
signatureItem: Egg coffee at any of the upper floor cafes

name: Ngo Ngang Workspace Cafe
personalNotes: Best spot for laptop work in D3. The back room is the quietest with the most stable wifi.

name: Skyline Saigon Bar
personalNotes: Come before 7pm to catch happy hour and avoid the tour groups.

name: Banh Mi Huynh Hoa
personalNotes: The most famous banh mi in Saigon for a reason. Yes there's always a queue. Yes it's worth it.

name: Puppy Garden Cafe
personalNotes: One of the few places you can bring your dog. Coffee is decent, not amazing.
